description: Product Description Arix 624 Round Bath Sponge Experience the care and elegance that highlight your beauty. Carefully developed and infused with high-quality ingredients, this product is ideal for perfecting your daily beauty routine. Whether taking care of your skin, hair or nails, this product offers versatility, luxurious textures and excellent value for money. Trust in the effectiveness and feel-good factor to make your natural radiance shine. Directions Rinse before and after use. Safety Warning Always rinse thoroughly before and after use. Allow to dry completely between uses to prevent bacterial growth. See more
